verses.1: My soul rests in God alone.
verses.2: He alone is my rock, my salvation, and my fortress.
verses.3: How long will you assault a man?
verses.4: They fully intend to throw him down from his lofty place.
verses.5: My soul, wait in silence for God alone,
verses.6: He alone is my rock and my salvation, my fortress.
verses.7: My salvation and my honor is with God.
verses.8: Trust in him at all times, you people.
verses.9: Surely men of low degree are just a breath,
verses.12: Also to you, Lord, belongs loving kindness,
